content.text: Perfect! Now let me verify the package.json files to understand the projects better:

Excellent! Now I have a complete understanding. Let me provide a comprehensive report:

## Project Structure Exploration Report

I've thoroughly explored the projects at C:\Users\User. Here's what I found:

### Project Overview
There are **two separate projects** in the user directory:

1. **SaaSV2** (C:\Users\User\SaaSV2) - Main SaaS Application using Next.js
2. **mon-saas** (C:\Users\User\mon-saas) - Demo/Template project using Vite + React

---

## SaaSV2 Project Structure (Next.js App)

### Root-Level Files
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\App.tsx** - Main React component (legacy Vite-style)
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\index.tsx** - React DOM entry point
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\types.ts** - Central TypeScript type definitions
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\middleware.ts** - Next.js middleware
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\tailwind.config.ts** - Tailwind CSS configuration
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\vite.config.ts** - Vite configuration
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\tsconfig.json** - TypeScript configuration
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\next.config.mjs** - Next.js configuration
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\package.json** - Dependencies management

### Pages Directory (C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\pages)
- **Analyze.tsx** - Analysis results page
- **Dashboard.tsx** - Main dashboard page
- **Directory.tsx** - Directory/listing page
- **Home.tsx** - Home page
- **Login.tsx** - Login/authentication page
- **Plan.tsx** - Pricing and plans management page (FOUND)
- **Projects.tsx** - Projects management page
- **Results.tsx** - Results display page

### Components Directory (C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\components)
- **AICitationPreview.tsx** - AI citation preview component
- **CategoryCard.tsx** - Category card component
- **GenerationModal.tsx** - Content generation modal
- **RecommendationCard.tsx** - Recommendation card component
- **ScoreRing.tsx** - Score visualization ring component

### App Directory (C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app)
Next.js App Router structure:

#### Layout Files
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\layout.tsx** - Root layout
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\globals.css** - Global styles (Tailwind + custom CSS variables)
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\(app)\app\layout.tsx** - App section layout
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\(app)\app\page.tsx** - App home page

#### Project Routes
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\(app)\app\projects\page.tsx** - Projects listing
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\(app)\app\projects\[id]\layout.tsx** - Dynamic project layout
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\(app)\app\projects\[id]\overview\page.tsx** - Project overview

#### Authentication Routes
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\(auth)\login\page.tsx** - Login page
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\(auth)\register\page.tsx** - Registration page

#### Public Routes
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\(public)\page.tsx** - Public landing page

#### API Routes
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\api\runs\start\route.ts** - Analysis run endpoint
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\api\stripe\checkout\route.ts** - Stripe checkout endpoint
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\api\stripe\portal\route.ts** - Stripe portal endpoint
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\api\stripe\webhook\route.ts** - Stripe webhook handler

### Services Directory (C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\services)
- **analyzer.ts** - Analysis engine
- **criteria.ts** - Scoring criteria
- **generator.ts** - Content generation service

### Library/Utils Directory (C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\lib)
- **ai-provider.ts** - AI provider integration (Google GenAI)
- **scoring.ts** - Scoring logic
- **stripe.ts** - Stripe integration
- **utils.ts** - Utility functions
- **supabase/** - Supabase directory (database/auth services)

### Styling
- **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\globals.css** - Global CSS with:
  - Tailwind directives (@tailwind base/components/utilities)
  - CSS custom properties (--primary, --secondary, --accent, etc.)
  - Dark mode configuration
  - .glass-panel utility class

---

## Key Type Definition: User Interface

From **C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\types.ts**:

```typescript
export interface User {
  id: string;
  email: string;
  name: string;
  credits: number;
  plan: 'free' | 'pro' | 'enterprise';
  workspaceId?: string;
  role?: 'owner' | 'admin' | 'analyst' | 'viewer';
}
```

### Additional Types in types.ts
- **Project** - Project metadata (name, domain, logo, status, scores, trends)
- **Recommendation** - Optimization recommendations (priority, title, action, effort, impact)
- **CategoryScore** - Score breakdown by category
- **AnalysisResult** - Full analysis with global score and recommendations
- **HistoryItem** - Historical analysis data
- **GeneratedSolution** - AI-generated solutions (code or text)

---

## Plan.tsx Component Details

**Location:** C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\pages\Plan.tsx

**Key Features:**
- Two main tabs: "my-plan" and "pricing"
- Plan display showing: Starter (Free), Pro (89€/month), Agency (Custom)
- Features list, usage stats (projects, credits)
- Stripe integration for payments
- Plan management buttons
- Responsive grid layout using Tailwind CSS

**Props Interface:**
```typescript
interface PlanProps {
  onBack: () => void;
  onNavigateToProjects: () => void;
  user: User | null;
}
```

---

## mon-saas Project (Vite + React)

**Location:** C:\Users\User\mon-saas

This is a simpler template project:
- **src/App.tsx** - Main app component (Vite template)
- **src/main.tsx** - Entry point
- **src/App.css** - App styles
- **src/index.css** - Global styles
- **src/assets/react.svg** - React logo

---

## Technology Stack Summary

### SaaSV2 (Main Project)
- **Framework:** Next.js 14.2.3
- **UI Library:** React 18
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS + PostCSS
- **Database/Auth:** Supabase
- **Payment:** Stripe
- **AI Integration:** Google GenAI
- **Icons:** Lucide React
- **Charts:** Recharts
- **Forms:** React Hook Form
- **Validation:** Zod
- **Language:** TypeScript 5

### mon-saas (Template)
- **Build Tool:** Vite 7.2.4
- **Framework:** React 19.2.0
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS 4.1.18
- **Icons:** Lucide React
- **Language:** TypeScript 5.9.3

---

## Important Notes

1. **No Account.tsx found** - There is no Account.tsx file in the codebase. The account/user management appears to be handled through the auth routes and the Plan component.

2. **Plan.tsx Location** - Located in the `/pages` folder (legacy structure), not in `/app` folder, suggesting a mixed Next.js Pages Router + App Router setup.

3. **Styling Approach** - The project uses utility-first CSS with Tailwind, no separate .module.css files, all styles are inline with Tailwind classes.

4. **Global Styling** - All theme colors, dark mode, and custom utilities are defined in C:\Users\User\SaaSV2\app\globals.css as CSS custom properties.
